resources.string: This song cannot be played right now.
This version cannot be played from this source right now.
Playback expired. Try playing again.
Sign in is required to play this song.
This song is not available right now.
This song could not be saved right now. Try another version or try again later.
Your personal library cannot be reached right now. Check that your desktop app is open or try again.
Search isn\\\'t available right now. Check your connection and try again.
Nothing matched your search. Try different words or check spelling.
Nothing here yet. Try a different filter or add music to your library.
No albums here yet. Albums appear when you add music to your library.
No artists here yet. Artists appear when you add music to your library.
No playlists here yet. Create one to organize your music.
No offline songs yet. Save songs for offline listening from the player menu.
This app does not support playing age-restricted songs yet.
Code: %1$s (%2$d)
View technical details
View sync details
Hide technical details
Technical details
No songs in this playlist yet. Add songs from search or your library.
Online catalog
Refresh song details from the online catalog
Keep songs ready while streaming
Saves recent streams so playback resumes faster. This is not the same as saving offline.
Video opens inside Roofy for now. A dedicated player view is planned.
Note: This enables sync with the online catalog and cannot be changed later.
Sync this playlist with the online catalog
Refresh song details from the online catalog
Note: Online catalog lyrics may appear when no other source is available. They are often out of sync with the song.
Buffer streams while playing
Keeps a temporary copy for smoother replay. Saved offline music is separate.
Note: Your online catalog account must be verified with a phone number to change playlist artwork.
Clear all streaming buffer songs?
Clear all stored artwork?
Show online catalog playlists in Android Auto
The limit you chose (%1$s) is smaller than what the app is using. Some stored %2$s may be removed. Continue anyway?
Listening history settings
Only log songs longer than (seconds)
Log to listening history after this much of the song (%)
Wait before logging a play (minutes)
Offline buffer
Remove from streaming buffer
Show streaming buffer playlist (advanced)
Play again
Fullscreen
Nothing in the queue. Play a song or add tracks from your library.
No listening stats yet
Stats appear after you listen long enough for a track to count.
Open queue
Collapse queue
Lock queue editing
Unlock queue editing
Reorder
Close
Keep listening — your recap will show up here.
Open video
Open video
Video
Back to player
